notes: Streaming agent and OpenAI provider were structurally correct. Phase 2 delivered 6 regression tests covering: (1) assistant toolCalls message precedes tool result messages in the second LLM call context, (2) token events from follow-up streams are yielded after tool execution, (3) session is persisted with final assistant response after tool flows, (4) multiple tool calls produce multiple tool_call and tool_result events, (5) tool execution failures feed error back to LLM without crashing the stream, (6) max iterations yields fallback message and done event. All 407 tests pass; tsc --noEmit and npm run build are clean.
